wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team|isdisbanded=yes |name= EloHell |orgcountry= Poland |country= |region=EU |image=EloHelllogo square.png |coaches= |manager= |captain= |website= http://www.elohell.net |youtube= |facebook= https://www.facebook.com/elohell.net |twitter= |irc= |sponsor= [http://elohell.net elohell.net] |created= 2012-07-11 |disbanded= |trades= }} '''EloHell''' is a Polish League of Legends team affiliated with the titular website [http://elohell.net/ elohell.net]. The squad formed on July 11, 2012 and was announced to take part in the [[European Challenger Circuit: Poland]] event in Warsaw on July 27.[http://www.facebook.com/elohell.net/posts/296955383736525 EloHell.net presents their new team] ''facebook.com'' They recieved 50 Circuit Points for their 5./6. place in this tournament, resulting in a six-way tie for the 8th place in the Circuit Ranking. After winning the [[Season Two/Regional Finals - Cologne/Qualifiers|Season 2 - Regional Finals Cologne Decider]] EloHell.net managed to grab the last spot for the [[Season Two/Regional Finals - Cologne|Season 2 - Regional Finals Cologne]]. == Timeline == {{TDRight |name1=2012 |name2=2013}} {{TDRight|tab}} * January 14, '''EloHell''' acquires roster of Mysie Pysie. '''[[Grom]]''', '''[[Artinho]]''', '''[[ExeSolc]]''', '''[[Pachols]]''' and '''[[Ðãnny (Krystian Koniecko)|Ðãnny]]''' join.[http://www.leagueoflegends.pl/forum/showthread.php?tid=101903 Mysie Pysie jako Elohell.net na S3 Regionals (Polishj)] ''leagueoflegends.pl'' * February, roster leaves organization. {{TDRight|tab}} *July 11, '''EloHell''' is formed with '''[[Veggie]]''', '''[[Shushei]]''', '''[[Kubon]]''', '''[[HosaN]]''' and '''[[Grom]]'''. *July 31, [[Kubon]] leaves. *August 1, '''[[Kikis]]''' joins. *August 21, [[HosaN]] is replaced by '''[[Van Der Fckk]]'''.[https://www.facebook.com/MSkikis/posts/462690923765427 Kikis Facebook Post] ''facebook.com'' *August 26, [[Shushei]] leaves.[http://www.facebook.com/shushei.net/posts/473432512690546 Shushei Facebook Post] ''facebook.com'' *August 31, EloHell disbands.[https://www.facebook.com/MSkikis/posts/466433963391123 Kikis Facebook Post] ''facebook.com'' *November 19, EloHell acquires roster of [[Kiedyś Miałem Team]]. '''[[ArQuel]]''', '''[[Xaxus]]''', '''[[Overpow]]''', '''[[Elendix]]''' and '''[[Woolite]]''' join. [http://elohell.net/news/181348 Official: EloHell.net acquire KMT!] ''elohell.net'' * December 7, roster leaves organization.
